Destroyed were the hands of Abu Lahab, and he lay utterly doomed.Footnote-1
His wealth did not avail him, nor his acquisitions.Footnote-2
Surely, he will be cast into a Flaming Fire
along with his wife,Footnote-3 that carrier of slanderous tales;Footnote-4
upon her neck shall be a rope of palm-fibre.Footnote-5
